name: @stackra/dashboard
purpose: Headless dashboard framework — domain types, storage adapter, widget registry, widget catalogue, React hooks, and DI module.
capabilities: Widget + layout domain types (grid, row, column, tile)
@Widget() registry with catalogue for palette rendering
when_to_use: Composing per-user or per-tenant dashboards from a catalogue of pluggable widgets.
when_not_to_use: For pure charts use @stackra/ui recharts helpers; for reporting use the backend reporting package.
